title: agropyron repens var. tenerum
intro: Agropyron repens var. tenerum, also known as creeping bentgrass, is a type of grass species that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Agropyron repens var. tenerum include its ability to soothe digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. It can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
